page: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server configured with an Intel Xeon 2288G processor featuring 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The system includes 128.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is provided by a local 3840 GB NVMe SSD, and the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. No GPU accelerators are present on this hardware configuration.

Benchmark data indicates average performance for both single-core and multi-core operations, with stress-ng scores of 2024.2 and 19837.37 respectively. Single-threaded gzip compression performs in the top tier at 36.22 GB/sec, and the Passmark memory score is also in the top tier at 3594.89. However, a key performance tradeoff is observed in large-block memory bandwidth, where read-only speeds of 29.76 GB/sec and write speeds of 15.32 GB/sec are classified as weak.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this bare metal server offers high resource density by combining dedicated physical CPU cores with a large local NVMe storage array. This hardware profile is well-suited for database hosting, static web serving, and memory-intensive data processing tasks that benefit from dedicated physical resources and fast local storage, rather than workloads requiring high large-block memory bandwidth.
description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server powered by an Intel Xeon 2288G processor with 16 dedicated physical cores operating at 3.7 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of DDR4 memory and a 3840 GB local NVMe SSD, with no GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show top-tier results in single-threaded gzip compression and Passmark memory tests, alongside average multi-core CPU and database performance. However, the server exhibits a tradeoff with weak large-block memory bandwidth. This configuration provides high resource density, making it a viable option for database hosting, static web serving, and general-purpose workloads requiring dedicated physical resources and substantial local storage.
og_description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server featuring an Intel Xeon 2288G CPU with 16 physical cores, 128 GB DDR4 RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe storage, optimized for database hosting and dedicated workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vbm-8c-132gb is a bare metal server with 16 Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe storage, built for dedicated database and web workloads.
tagline: A dedicated bare metal server combining sixteen physical cores with high-capacity local NVMe storage and dense memory for database workloads.

128.0 GB of DDR4 memory and 3840 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
